name: Mischance
short_description: Mischance is a game about surviving as long as possible with a curse that guarantees an imminent death. Everything in your day-to-day life is now much more likely to kill you. Your objective is to make smart choices and hope that the most simplest of activities don't end up taking your life.
detailed_description:
Mischance is a game that relies heavily on an RNG system. Each and every little task you perform has the chance to kill you (some more than others).

  • Starter Cards - At the beginning of every run, players will have 3 cards to choose from, each having it's own advantage of reducing the % chance of corresponding types of death.

  • Scenario - Sometimes, a scenario will pop up that gives the players a few options to choose from. Each option can either benefit the player or backfire against them. While some scenarios have randomised outcomes for the same option, others have only one right answer.

  • Health - Your health slowly deteriorates if you do not take care of your hygiene. Make sure to wash your hands regularly!

  • Transport - You have three options to choose from when deciding how to go to work, one of them being skipping work completely. Each option has it's own pros and cons.

  • Finances - Use the limited money you have smartly. Buy appliances that keep you alive or reduce your costs, but be careful not to run out of money in such a perilious situation!

Every night you money gets deducted for foor or tax expenses. Each new day can offer new scenarios or problems. Play smartly, pray you're just lucky enough and maybe...just maybe...you might make it out alive.
